summary: Tested transparent stamp functionality for TLS Document Verification system. All core features working correctly - stamp generation with transparent backgrounds for all shapes (circle, oval, rectangle), white backgrounds only behind content elements, PDF stamping with transparent stamps, different layouts working. Opacity slider correctly removed from UI.

minor.issue: 404 Not Found - stamp preview endpoint doesn't exist. Stamping works correctly though.

backend_api_tests: Advocate login with test credentials - PASS
Document stamping with rectangle shape - PASS
Document stamping with circle shape - PASS
Document stamping with oval shape - PASS
frontend_tests: Login page loads and functions - PASS
Shape selectors (Rectangle, Circle, Oval) visible and clickable - PASS
Opacity slider correctly REMOVED from UI - PASS
Stamp preview visible after upload - PASS
Progress bar shows correct steps - PASS
transparent_stamp_verification: Circle stamp with transparent background generated - PASS
Oval stamp with transparent background generated - PASS
Rectangle stamp with transparent background generated - PASS
White backgrounds appear only behind content elements (QR, text, logo) - PASS
Stamps applied correctly to PDF documents - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: The generate_branded_stamp_image function (lines 512-1135) correctly implements transparent backgrounds with white backing behind content
transparent_bg = (255, 255, 255, 0) for fully transparent stamp background
content_bg = (255, 255, 255, 255) for opaque white behind QR codes, text, and signature areas
All shapes (circle, oval, rectangle) properly implement the transparent design pattern
The frontend correctly sets transparent_background='true' when stamping documents

success_rate.backend: 88% (8/9 core tests passed - stamp-preview endpoint missing but not critical)

seed_data_creation: Created test stamps with TEST_ prefix (TEST_TransparentStampDoc, TEST_CircleStampDoc, TEST_OvalStampDoc) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transparent stamp functionality fully tested and working. Key implementation in /app/backend/server.py generate_branded_stamp_image function (lines 512-1135). The frontend correctly passes transparent_background='true' when stamping. Opacity slider has been removed from DocumentStampPage.jsx. All three stamp shapes (circle, oval, rectangle) generate with transparent backgrounds and white backing only behind content elements.

transparent_stamps.circle_shape: Transparent background with white behind QR/text/logo
transparent_stamps.oval_shape: Transparent background with white behind QR/text/logo
transparent_stamps.rectangle_shape: Transparent background with white behind QR/text/logo

opacity_slider_removal.note: No opacity controls visible in stamp document UI
